target.name: Monterra Tax
target.pitch: Monterra Tax — AI-native short-term rental occupancy tax platform: real-time multi-jurisdiction rate monitoring, automated calculation, filing, and remittance for hosts, property managers, and accounting firms, with PMS integrations (Hostaway, Guesty, Hostfully, OwnerRez, and more).

queries: best software for short-term rental occupancy tax compliance
how to automate airbnb and vrbo lodging tax filing
occupancy tax software for multi-jurisdiction property managers
short-term rental tax remittance automation platform
how to calculate lodging tax rates across US jurisdictions
best tools to file occupancy taxes for vacation rental hosts
PMS integrated occupancy tax compliance software
short-term rental tax compliance platform for accounting firms
